name: Adept Chips Services Pvt. Ltd. (Acquired by Quest Global Services Pte. Ltd.)
h1: Adept Chips Services Pvt's GCC footprint in India
lede: Adept Chips Services Pvt runs seven centers across six Indian cities. Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Visakhapatnam, Pune, Belgaum and Kochi, covering GBS, R&D, CoE and engineering & design, built over eighteen years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Adept Chips Services Pvt office in India. We map seven, across six cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Adept Chips Services Pvt GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Adept Chips Services Pvt runs 7 verified centers across 6 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Visakhapatnam, Pune, Belgaum, Kochi), covering GBS, R&D, CoE and engineering & design. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Adept Chips Services Pvt's India footprint covers Bengaluru, Hyderabad, Visakhapatnam, Pune, Belgaum and Kochi, spanning GBS, R&D, CoE and engineering & design. The centers deliver IT, R&D and ER&D, Finance & Accounting and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 45 decision-makers, in one profile.
